sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nuntak na tuipi tungah huih nun ciang in
Si ding cih ngaihsun in
Na lungkiat
ciangin,
Thupha khat nungah thupha na ngaihsut leh
Nisim in a tawntung la na sa
dinghi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thupha khat nungah khat ngaihsun in,
A tampi hong pia hi thei ta
in
Thupha khat nung ah khat ngaihsun in
Pasian in a tampi hong pia thei ta
in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungmanna vangik bangin Na lel ngei hiam
Singlamteh hong puasak in
A gik thei
hiam
Thupha khat nungah
Thupha na ngaihsun leh
Nisim in a tawntung la na sa ding
hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mi dangte a sum apai na etciangin
Jesuh kiangah na ngahding sum ngaihsun
in,
Vantung khua sungah Na omna inn hi zong
Kuamah in leizo kei sum a om ding
hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua a hih ciangin gal kido laitak in,
Pasian in na khempeuh uk hi, lau kei
in
Vantung mihingte in Nang kiang ah om hi,
Lampi tawp dongin nanga hong huh ding hi
